title: Get Payment Agent Response
description: Full payment agent profile. Always includes a `currencies` array (one entry per supported currency with commission and limit settings) and a `urls` array. May include agents not publicly listed in the directory.

id.description: Unique identifier of the payment agent.

created_at.description: Epoch timestamp (milliseconds) when the agent was registered.

is_listed.description: Whether the agent appears in the public agent directory.

name.description: Display name of the payment agent.

information.description: Free-text description of the agent's services and operating details.

payment_methods.description: Payment methods accepted by this agent.

countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes in lowercase in which this agent operates.

urls.description: Website URLs associated with the agent.

currencies.description: Commission and limit settings for each currency the agent supports.

deposit_commission.description: Commission percentage charged by the agent on deposits. Null if no deposit commission applies.

withdrawal_commission.description: Commission percentage charged by the agent on withdrawals. Null if no withdrawal commission applies.

withdrawal_minimum.description: Minimum withdrawal amount as a decimal string. Null if no minimum is enforced.

withdrawal_maximum.description: Maximum withdrawal amount as a decimal string. Null if no maximum is enforced.

metadata.description: Request metadata included in every response.

method.description: The HTTP method used for the request.

timing.description: Time in seconds for the service to process the request.
